channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Andy Reid Addresses Travis Kelce's Retirement Plans as Chiefs Offseason Is Underway
item.description: The tight end, whose contract with the Kansas City Chiefs ends in March 2026, is contemplating retirement after his 13-year career in the league

item.title: “The Beauty'”s Anthony Ramos Recalls Filming 'Crazy Scene' While 'Butt-Ass Naked' in Front of Ashton Kutcher (Exclusive)
item.description: The actor talks to PEOPLE about playing the Assassin on the body horror thriller from co-creator Ryan Murphy

item.title: Jennifer Garner Says Boxing Was Key to “The Last Thing He Told Me” Season 2 Prep (Exclusive)
item.description: "I knew Hannah had prepared to fight," Garner tells PEOPLE of her character

item.title: Hilary Duff Breaks Silence on Ashley Tisdale's Toxic Mom Group Essay, Says It's 'Not New for Me'
item.description: On Jan. 1, Ashley Tisdale French penned an essay about her "toxic mom group," which is allegedly about Duff and her friends

item.title: Alexandra Daddario and Andrew Form Split After 3 Years of Marriage, Will 'Continue to Co-Parent' (Exclusive)
item.description: The couple got married in June 2022 and welcomed their first baby in October 2024

item.title: Ariana Madix Gathers Final Belongings From Former Home With Tom Sandoval
item.description: Ariana Madix moved on from her relationship with Tom Sandoval years ago ... but she's only now grabbing her remaining belongings from the home they on...

item.title: ALS Association Credits Eric Dane for Massive Uptick in Donations
item.description: Eric Dane's death is spurring people to action ... encouraging many to support researchers looking to cure ALS. A spokesperson for the ALS Association...

item.title: Guess Who the Actress and Model in Tiny Black Lingerie Is
item.description: This star's not afraid to bare all ... stripping down to some tiny lingerie, showing off her sizable assets -- and, we're not talking about the massiv...

item.title: Eminem’s Ex-Wife Kim Scott Drank 2 Margaritas at Chili's Before Drunk Driving Arrest: Police Report
item.description: Eminem’s ex-wife, Kim Scott, told cops she drank two margaritas at Chili's prior to her DUI arrest ... this according to the police report from the in...

item.title: Glamorous Brazilian Influencer Bianca Dias Dead at 27 After Plastic Surgery
item.description: Tragedy has struck Brazil’s influencer world ... Bianca Dias has died at just 27, just days after undergoing plastic surgery. The glamorous social med...
